publishedAbstract: * After an upgrade one of the monitor pods is unable to get “Running” status due Insufficient CPU. ~~~ Events: Type Reason Age From Message------------------------- Warning FailedScheduling 13h default-scheduler 0/10 nodes are available: 3 node(s) didn't match pod affinity/anti-affinity, 3 node(s) didn't match pod anti-affinity rules, 3 Insufficient cpu, 6 node(s) didn't match node selector. ~~~ * Comparing the resources assigned to the nodes with the ones indicated in the Deployment Guide it’s seen the resources should be enough
publishedTitle: OCS 4.X - Pod in Pending State after an upgrade due to Insufficient CPU
